DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CHIME FINANCIAL, INC.'s DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The Nangia declaration provides parties did not meet and confer, as required by CCP 430.41. Parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately. Responsive pleadings are now due by March 25, 2024.

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda/Victor da Fonseca; Not reported.(302/RCE)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CARVER FARROW, Esq. of Dracup & Patterson, Inc. (Tel: 833-221-2990) as movant/counsel-of-record for plaintiff Kopeck LLC;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF KOPECK LLC.

Matter discussed.

The Court instructs plaintiff's counsel to contact its chambers number at 10:15 a.m. for an in camera discussion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

***** After conducting an in camera discussion with movant, the Court signs an order granting the motion to be relieved as counsel. (302/RBU) *****
